title: psychotria conephoroides
intro: Psychotria conephoroides, also known as the Mexican wild coffee or wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as conephorine. The health benefits of Psychotria conephoroides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal medicine, it is often used in preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
